seo.title: Prompts | Fly Labs
seo.description: Copy-paste AI prompts for coding, writing, strategy, marketing, and more. Vote, comment, and suggest new prompts.

gate.gateDescription: The ones I actually use every day. Free account gets you the full library, voting, and comments.

suggest.title: Suggest a Prompt
suggest.description: Got a prompt that works great? Or an idea for one? Share it and help the library grow.
suggest.successDesc: I'll test it, add my spin, and credit you if it makes the cut.
suggest.contentLabel: The prompt or describe the idea
suggest.contentPlaceholder: Paste the full prompt text, or describe what it should do and when to use it.

toast.signUpToCommentDesc: Create a free account to join the conversation.
toast.signUpToVoteDesc: Create a free account to upvote prompts.
toast.fillRequired: Please fill in all required fields.
toast.invalidEmailDesc: Please enter a valid email address.
toast.slowDownDesc: Max 3 suggestions per day. Try again later.
toast.failedDesc: Couldn't send your suggestion. Please try again.
